title: Golden Crisp Portuguese Chicken Skewers
description: A citrusy and crisp Portuguese dish featuring gherkin relish, perfect for a festive occasion, and diabetic-friendly due to its low carb content.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, stir the gherkin relish in a small bowl.
Once the chicken is done, brush the gherkin relish onto the skewers.
Garnish with bay leaves and serve immediately.
Serve with a side of roasted vegetables or a salad for a complete meal.
